Software Developer

Hi, I'm Casey Hsu and my current goal is to become a junior developer who will work with a team to build and manage applications. I recently graduated from George Brown College with honors in Computer Programming and Analysis.

Available for work from 2026 onwards

View Projects

WHAT I'M UP TO NOW

Since graduating, I've been freelancing across several platforms — here's a look at the kind of work I've been doing and the tools I'm using day to day.

Freelance Ongoing since 2024

Building Custom WordPress Solutions for Small Businesses

Since graduating from George Brown College, I've been working with small business clients to design and develop custom WordPress sites that actually perform. This includes building child themes from scratch, integrating WooCommerce for e-commerce storefronts, and optimizing page speed scores to keep load times under two seconds.

A big part of this work involves translating client requirements into maintainable, extensible themes using ACF (Advanced Custom Fields) and custom post types — giving non-technical clients a clean editing experience while keeping the codebase organized for future developers.

WordPressPHPWooCommerceACFTheme DevelopmentSEO
Freelance Ongoing since 2024

Crafting Shopify Storefronts & Liquid Customizations

On the Shopify side, I've been helping direct-to-consumer brands launch and refine their online stores. My work ranges from customizing existing themes with Liquid templating to building entirely new sections, collection filters, and dynamic product pages that improve the shopping experience.

I also handle integrations with third-party apps for email marketing, reviews, and inventory management, ensuring everything runs smoothly from storefront to checkout. Performance, accessibility, and mobile responsiveness are always top priorities in every build.

ShopifyLiquidTheme CustomizationE-CommerceJavaScript
Freelance Ongoing since 2025

HubSpot CMS Development & Marketing Automation

More recently, I've started taking on HubSpot CMS projects — building custom landing pages, blog templates, and email templates using the HubL templating language. The goal is always to give marketing teams flexible, drag-and-drop modules while maintaining brand consistency and fast page loads.

Beyond the CMS, I've been helping clients configure workflows and automation sequences in HubSpot's CRM tools, connecting forms and lead capture to automated nurture campaigns. It's been a great way to bridge front-end development with real business outcomes.

HubSpotHubLCMSCRMMarketing AutomationEmail Templates

FEATURED PROJECTS

Explore my portfolio, showcasing some of my most intriguing and innovative projects.

Menu Master Restaurant Management System

This cross-platform web-based application is designed to streamline restaurant operations, from managing ingredient inventory and menu items to employee scheduling and more.

ReactMongoDBRustRocket
Visit Repo

Tic-Tac-Toe AI MiniMax

Want to play? Grab a friend for a round of Tic-Tac-Toe, or challenge our AI! Built with JavaFX and powered by the Minimax algorithm, our AI will keep you on your toes.

JavaAIJavaFXMinimax
Visit Repo

SpaceX Launch Tracker with Angular

Blast off with this Angular application! Users can view upcoming SpaceX launches, as well as details about past launches, all fetched from the SpaceX API.

AngularBootstrapSpaceX APIRender
Visit Repo

Airport Flight System Application

Ready for take-off? Using C# and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), this flight management system allows you to book, view and cancel your flights. Additionally, it uses CRUD operations for efficient user and flight data management.

C#ASP.NETData StructuresCRUD
Visit Repo

ABOUT ME

During the COVID-19 pandemic, I decided to pursue my long-standing passion for computers and programming, transitioning from my nine-year career as a professional chef.

My interest in technology began at the age of eight when I built my first computer, and I have been deeply enthusiastic about the field ever since.

I'm open to job opportunities where I can contribute, learn, and grow. If you have a suitable opportunity that aligns with my skills, please feel free to reach me @ casey-hsu@outlook.com

Would you like to work with me?

If you’d like to learn more, collaborate, or chat about a project, you can reach me directly through my contact page.
